report.summary: Day 16 cycle 4 standup: Full 6-agent cycle completed last hour — Day 33 publish batch (7 pages, deploy 25ebFpMMz), exchange reviews social card + community content, 2 new learn guides built (bitcoin-treasury + crypto-debit-cards); 323 pages confirmed live, PUBLISH_QUEUE down to 2; FOMC window T-3 and blockers persist.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle
items: Pages live: 323 (EOD v2 integrity-confirmed) — Day 33 publish batch of 7 fully live: /exchanges/reviews/binance, /exchanges/reviews/kraken, /exchanges/reviews/bybit, /exchanges/reviews/okx, /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide, /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide. All 4 major exchange review pages now indexed — affiliate revenue pages starting click accumulation.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide and /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026 (built this cycle, SEO-validated, ready to promote). Down from 7 last cycle after full Day 33 batch was cleared.

New content delta: 2 new learn guides added by build cycle — Bitcoin Treasury Companies (~2,800 words, 11 min read) covering Strategy/Twenty One Capital/corporate BTC holdings; Crypto Debit Cards 2026 (~2,600 words) covering Coinbase/Crypto.com/Bybit/BitPay/Gnosis Pay. Both represent content gaps with existing product page coverage but no learn guide.

New visual assets: social-exchange-reviews-2026.svg (1200×630) created — 4 exchange cards with brand-color accents, user counts, maker fees, feature tags. Exchange reviews tweet drafted + Discord/Telegram announcement queued for Mon Mar 16.
Deploy delta: 25ebFpMMz triggered during publish cycle — supersedes G7qnG32bm; expected Ready status (EOD v2 confirmed trigger, Jefe should verify in Vercel dashboard).
Bloomberg Screener V3: Continues live on DefiLlama real data — no degradation. FOMC catalyst still T-3 days (Wed Mar 19) — PayFi + Bloomberg Screener V3 + GENIUS Act thread remain pre-staged.
GSC organic signals: Day 16 of 14–21 window — earliest first clicks either today or tomorrow. 323 pages now confirmed crawlable + indexed.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ Day 33 publish batch — 7 pages promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES: 4 exchange reviews (Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX) + 3 learn guides (kaito-ai, btcfi, aave-v4); deploy 25ebFpMMz triggered (publish cycle)

SHIPPED ✅ Build v2 — 2 new learn guides scaffolded, researched, written, and SEO-optimised: /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide + /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026; 0 new TS errors; both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE
SHIPPED ✅ Design v2 — Exchange reviews social card (social-exchange-reviews-2026.svg) — glass-morphism 4-exchange layout with brand colors, fee data, 10-point scores
SHIPPED ✅ Community v15 — Exchange reviews launch content: Mon Mar 16 tweet, Discord/Telegram deep-dive announcement, all 4 review page direct links included

SHIPPED ✅ EOD v2 — Full QA sweep: 323-slug integrity check, 2 new guides pre-publish validated (schemas + OG + meta + 5 internal links each), 6 API routes structurally healthy; rate limiter gap flagged on 3 public routes
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; no wallet connectivity on any of 323 live pages; blocks gamification, referral attribution, repeat-visit retention hooks
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe action required (~15 min combined with WalletConnect); blocks Playwright CI before any Sprint 60 merges
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter not applied on /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics — flagged red in EOD v2; 0/3 public high-traffic routes protected; programmer task for next build cycle
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 non-blocking curly apostrophe TS errors; quick fix, carry-over from v3
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial expiry — ~10 days remaining; Jefe needs to add payment method to prevent service disruption
OPEN 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE 2 items — bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide + crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026 ready to promote next publish cycle

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Publish the 2-item queue + start next build cycle targeting FOMC content. bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide and crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026 are SEO-ready — promote immediately. For the build cycle: FOMC Wed Mar 19 (T-3) is the last window to produce rate-decision-sensitive content before the event. Best angle: 'How a Fed rate cut affects crypto yields' — bridges PayFi narrative with DCA/staking/lending tool pages that already exist. Delegate: Publish Queue promotes both; Build Cycle produces FOMC-rate-cut explainer + updates PayFiYieldCalculator CTA copy.

PRIORITY 2 — Fix rate limiter gap on 3 public API routes (/api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics). EOD v2 flagged this red: token bucket exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but is not applied to the highest-traffic public routes. With GSC signals arriving imminently and a potential FOMC-week traffic spike, an unprotected CoinGecko-dependent route failing under load would degrade all 323 pages that rely on live price data. Fix is a ~30-min programmer task: import checkRateLimit() and wire it into the 3 routes before next deploy.

PRIORITY 3 — Jefe blocker resolution (WalletConnect + GitHub Actions + Vercel payment). All three are manual steps only Jefe can perform, all are documented, all are blocking growth-layer features. Framing: every organic session arriving from Google this week has no retention mechanism — no wallet connect prompt, no gamification trigger, no referral hook. Combined time cost for Jefe: ~20 minutes. Combined unlock value: full retention stack across 323 pages as organic traffic arrives.
